nasb.text: Therefore, thus says the Lord God, “An enemy, even one surrounding the land, Will pull down your strength from you And your citadels will be looted.”

esv.text: Therefore thus says the Lord God: “An adversary shall surround the land and bring down your defenses from you, and your strongholds shall be plundered.”

cnv.text: 因此，主耶和華這樣說： “敵人必圍攻這地， 使你們的勢力傾覆， 搶掠你們的堡壘。”

ccb.text: 所以，主耶和华说： “敌人要围攻此地， 攻破他们的防守， 抢掠他们的城堡。”
